about.title: ENTRELEC
about.description: ENTRELEC is an Algerian SARL established in 1997, specialized primarily in the electrical industry sector.
about.description2: ENTRELEC offers you a complete range of services in the following areas:
about.service3: Supply of generators, voltage stabilizers, UPS, electrical cabinets
about.expertise: To achieve this, ENTRELEC relies on the experience of its managers and technical staff. It also has a dedicated engineering department to find the best solutions to resolve technical problems posed by its clients.
about.coverage: ENTRELEC's operations cover the entire Algerian territory.
about.devDesc: ENTRELEC continuously invests in research and development to offer innovative and sustainable solutions to its clients.
about.qualityDesc: Our commitment to quality and excellence allows us to maintain the highest industry standards.
